caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone in an indoor studio. The setting includes walls decorated with framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. Racks of clothing are partially visible behind him. On-screen logos include a circular graphic with "THE" and a red text logo that reads "RED VELVET". Throughout the sequence, the man is captured in a medium close-up shot, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and mouth as he speaks. He maintains a consistent position in front of the microphone while the background remains static, focusing the viewer's attention on his verbal delivery and reactions.
